Thus. you have to take the planets ruling the moment at whiCh
there is the urqe to put a particular question. Let us proceed. Today, it
is Tuesday. It is ruled by Mars. Now Moon is in the fii"St degree of Gemini.
The Nakshatra i:s Mrigasirisha. which is ruled by Mars. The sign is Gemini,
whkh is ruled by Mercury. The lagna is Leo (Simha) which is o-wned by
Sun. Also_ it is necessary to note the asterism in whiCh the lagna has
fal~n. Lagna is in the last portion of the star Poo!'Vapalguni (otherwise
called Pooram). whic:h is governe-d by venus-Sukra. Therefore, Shukla
also must be taken. Hence, the number of planets are four. The
signffic.ators are four and one has to take Mars. Mercury, Sun and Venus.
